title: Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe
html:
Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe

Part of the NodeJS Visual Studio tools.

Execute

Spawn a new process via Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe.

Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe normal 1 {PATH:.exe}

Launch specified executable as a subprocess of Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
